name: ios-swift
description: Expert iOS development skill covering SwiftUI, UIKit, Core Data, App Store guidelines, and performance optimization. Use this skill when building, reviewing, or debugging iOS apps - views, navigation, data persistence, animations, or submission preparation. Triggers on SwiftUI layout and state management, UIKit view controller lifecycle, Core Data model design and migrations, App Store Review Guidelines compliance, memory and rendering performance profiling, and Swift concurrency patterns for iOS.
